orderedActions.apply: Create an isolated Supabase branch or dedicated staging project with sanitized seed data and independent credentials.
orderedActions.rollback: Delete the isolated branch/project after preserving non-sensitive test evidence.

orderedActions.apply: Capture catalog-only schema, policy, grants and function signatures; verify a restorable backup before any write.
orderedActions.rollback: No schema rollback required; discard stale evidence and recapture.

orderedActions.apply: Generate a new Supabase CLI migration from the observed remote schema. Port the hierarchy contract to assigned_user_id; do not replay the legacy assigned_to migration.
orderedActions.rollback: Revert the new migration in staging and restore the captured policy/grant snapshot; retain additive nullable columns if dropping them could destroy data.

orderedActions.apply: Create private, schema-qualified helpers for profile descendants and lead visibility with explicit auth.uid() checks and an empty search_path.
orderedActions.rollback: Restore previous policies first, then revoke and drop only helpers introduced by the reviewed change set.

orderedActions.apply: Replace tenant-only profiles/leads policies with tenant plus commercial-hierarchy policies in one staging transaction; keep RLS enabled.
orderedActions.rollback: Recreate the exact prechange policies from the catalog snapshot inside a rollback transaction.

orderedActions.apply: Revoke unnecessary anon CRUD grants and grant authenticated only the operations required by the reviewed UI/API contract.
orderedActions.rollback: Restore only the prechange grants captured in the catalog snapshot; never grant broader privileges than the previous state.

orderedActions.apply: Persist the exact search_knowledge_chunks signature and body, set a safe search_path, preserve the organization predicate, and remove anon/authenticated EXECUTE unless a reviewed server flow requires it.
orderedActions.rollback: Restore the prior versioned definition and prechange EXECUTE grants from the snapshot.

orderedActions.apply: Enable leaked-password protection through Supabase Auth configuration after validating login and password recovery in staging.
orderedActions.rollback: Restore the previous Auth setting only if staging authentication regresses and record the exception.

orderedActions.apply: Run all Phase 8 tenant, role, denied-write and privileged-function scenarios with sanitized identities in isolated staging.
orderedActions.rollback: Remove test identities and sanitized fixtures; preserve only approved non-sensitive evidence.

orderedActions.apply: Prepare a separate production migration proposal only after security, product and rollback approvals.
orderedActions.rollback: Keep production unchanged when any gate is incomplete.
